title: DeployGTM Account Matrix
description: Client-agnostic account intelligence schema. One record per target account per client engagement. Reuse across any DeployGTM client by swapping client_name and the accounts array.

client_name.description: Slug identifying the DeployGTM client (e.g. peregrine-space, acme-corp)

voice_notes.description: How the client writes. Used by the outreach generator to match their tone. Include: sentence length, vocabulary register, things to avoid, preferred close.

domain.description: Company website domain (used for enrichment lookups)

icp_tier.description: 1 = reach out immediately, 2 = reach out this week, 3 = nurture and monitor

market.description: Broad market grouping an SDR would recognize (e.g. NewSpace, Defense Tech, B2B SaaS)

segment.description: Meaningful subdivision of the market (e.g. Constellation Operators, SAR Imaging, Satellite Bus Manufacturers)

persona.description: Who owns the problem at this account

title.description: Job title of the decision-maker or primary influencer

why_they_feel_it.description: Why this specific person feels the pain — in their frame, not the client's

angle.description: The directional argument — a specific claim we are making to this account. Not a pain point. One sentence. Something a rep can build a message around.

why_now_signal.description: A verifiable public signal that justifies reaching out now. Must be something that can be referenced in outreach without sounding like you surveilled them.

description.description: What specifically happened — the fact that can be referenced

source.description: Where this was found (SAM.gov, LinkedIn, Crunchbase, SpaceNews, etc.)

product_fit.description: What specifically about the client's product solves this account's problem — precise, not generic

heritage_risk.description: How likely a heritage / qualification objection is to block this deal. Client-specific qualifiers allowed (e.g. 'Low — commercial terms', 'High — MILSPEC required').

notes.description: Anything not captured in structured fields — recent context, prior conversations, watch-outs
